DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED FROM SEP-08-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION AT SEP-14-2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES THE MATTER TO SEPTEMBER 14, 2009. LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MELLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, MELLON FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION #1; MELLON LEASING CORPORATION, AND, MELLON VENTURES, INC.'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE AND DISMISS NON-EXISTING PARTY IS GRANTED. SUIT IS BROUGHT AGAINST AN ENTITY THAT DOES NOT LEGALLY EXIST. THE REMAINING CLAIMS ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO THIS LAWSUIT ONLY, AS THE IDENTICAL ACTION IS BROUGHT AGAINST THESE REMAINING PARTIES IN CASE NUMBER 489460. PLAINTIFF IS TO PROCEED WITH CASE NUMBER 489460. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT GRANTING MELLON'S DEMURRER AND MOTION TO DISMISS NON-EXISTING PARTY AND MELLON'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE AND DISMISS NON-EXISTING PARTY. Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service And Dismiss Non-Existing Party
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MELLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, MELLON FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION #1; MELLON LEASING CORPORATION, and, MELLON VENTURES, INC. Motion to Quash Service and Dismiss Non-Existing Party. Appearances: Marjory Gentry, Esq. and Peter Obstler, Esq. of Bingham McCutchen LLP 415) 393-2790, appearing for Defendant and moving party; John Karls, Plaintiff Pro Per and opposing party appearing (917) 270-1280. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to quash and dismiss granted. Suit is brought against an entity that does not legally exist. The remaining claims are dismissed with prejudice as to this lawsuit only, as the identical action is brought against these remaining parties in case number 489460. Plaintiff is to proceed with case number 489460. Order signed in open Court granting Mellon's demurrer and motion to dismiss non-existing party and Mellon's Motion to Quash Service and dismiss non-existing party. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR #5208

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MELLON CAPITAL MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, MELLON FINANCIAL SERVICES CORPORATION #1; MELLON LEASING CORPORATION, and, MELLON VENTURES, INC. DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Marjory Gentry, Esq. and Peter Obstler, Esq. of Bingham McCutchen LLP 415) 393-2790, appearing for Defendant and moving party; John Karls, Plaintiff Pro Per and opposing party appearing (917) 270-1280. Argued and the Court rules as follows: Demurrer is sustained . Order signed in open Court granting Mellon's demurrer and motion to dismiss non-existing party and Mellon's Motion to Quash Service and dismiss non-existing party. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR #5208
